requirements.task_name: Schedule the earliest standard AC repair appointment this Saturday between 9–11 AM
requirements.task_description: Book an air conditioning repair visit for ZIP code 30301 on the nearest upcoming Saturday, choosing the earliest available standard (non-emergency) time slot between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM and submitting the appointment form.

requirements.task_name: Request a quote for the highest-rated high-efficiency furnace under $3,500
requirements.task_description: Find high-efficiency furnaces (95%+ AFUE) under $3,500, sort them by customer rating, select the highest-rated option, and submit an installation quote request with full contact details.

requirements.task_name: Purchase the cheapest annual maintenance plan covering both heating and cooling under $200
requirements.task_description: Locate maintenance plans that cover both heating and cooling, filter to annual plans, sort by price, choose the cheapest plan priced at or below $200, add it to the cart, and complete the on-site checkout form.

requirements.task_name: Book a duct cleaning service using a promotion with at least 15% discount
requirements.task_description: Find a special offer related to duct cleaning that offers at least a 15% discount or a promotional price of $250 or less, open its details, and use it to book a duct cleaning appointment by submitting the booking form.

requirements.task_name: Submit an emergency heating service request for tonight after 8:00 PM
requirements.task_description: Request an emergency heating repair for ZIP code 30309 for the current date, selecting an available emergency time slot that starts at or after 8:00 PM and submitting the emergency service form.

requirements.task_name: Schedule installation of a smart thermostat under $250 with Wi‑Fi and 4+ star rating
requirements.task_description: Search for smart thermostats, filter to Wi‑Fi models under $250 with a rating of at least 4 stars, select the first result, and schedule an installation appointment by completing the booking form.

requirements.task_name: Start a financing request for a $5,000 new air conditioner using a 12‑month 0% APR plan
requirements.task_description: Go to the financing section, locate a financing option that offers 0% APR for at least 12 months, open that plan, and start an application for a $5,000 new air conditioner purchase by submitting the financing form.

requirements.task_name: Request a consultation for an indoor air quality service recommended in an article
requirements.task_description: Find a blog article about improving indoor air quality, follow the link to the recommended service (such as air purifier or UV air cleaner installation), and submit a consultation request form specifying a preferred date and afternoon time slot.
